full_summary: C/C++ file with ~0 functions. Handles low level operations or hardware interfaces typical for embedded systems in gt911.

chunks.content:
/**
  ******************************************************************************
  * @file    gt911_conf.h
  * @author  MCD Application Team

  *          gt911.c that can be modified by user.

/* Define to prevent recursive inclusion -------------------------------------*/
#ifndef GT911_CONF_H
#define GT911_CONF_H

#ifdef __cplusplus
extern "C" {
#endif

/* Includes ------------------------------------------------------------------*/
/* Macros --------------------------------------------------------------------*/
/* Exported types ------------------------------------------------------------*/
/* Exported constants --------------------------------------------------------*/
#define GT911_AUTO_CALIBRATION_ENABLED      0U
#define GT911_MAX_X_LENGTH                  800U
#define GT911_MAX_Y_LENGTH                  480U

#ifdef __cplusplus
}
#endif
#endif /* GT911_CONF_H */
